name: pandatask
description: Adds a shortcode [task_board board_name="unique_board_id"] to display a task management board.

scripts.test: npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:security
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:style
scripts.zip: npm run build && shx rm -rf release && shx mkdir -p release/pandatask/assets && shx cp pandatask.php README.txt release/pandatask/ && shx cp -r templates build src release/pandatask/ && shx cp -r assets/css assets/js release/pandatask/assets/ && cd release && bestzip ../pandatask.zip pandatask/ && cd .. && shx rm -rf release

author: Lukasz Liniewicz
